title: Polish & Extend

tasks_completed.notes: Discovered notion-update-page can't update properties via Pipedream. Implemented workaround using notion-append-block to add intel to page body as markdown. Created N5/scripts/notion_intel_prepend.py helper.
Added 'n5 deal add', 'n5 deal status', 'n5 deal list' commands to sms_deal_handler.py. Created rule f05393fc-c4ec-40fd-a8c9-4692a854a6a0 to auto-trigger handler on SMS.
Regenerated B37 for Tope/Calendly meeting with full strategic context, leverage points, skepticism factors, and actionable next steps.
Added --offset and backfill subcommand to email_deal_scanner.py. Created scheduled agent 329c4489-db3d-46b0-8a3a-8e5e33d55b32 for gradual 60-day backfill with self-destruction.

bonus_work.notes: Created N5/builds/broker-enrichment/ and enriched 10 Deal Brokers in Notion with CRM data + Aviato web research. Fixed Colin/Michael mixup.

artifacts.purpose: Polished deal intel block for Calendly/Tope meeting
Helper script for Notion append workaround
Updated with backfill subcommand and --offset flag
New build folder for broker enrichment work

notes_for_orchestrator: Pipedream Notion integration CANNOT update database property values - only notion-append-block works for adding content
SMS rule created but needs testing with actual inbound SMS
Backfill agent runs at 2AM ET for 3 nights, self-destructs when offset >= 60
Broker enrichment was bonus work outside original Worker 7 scope - may want separate build tracking
recommendations: Consider adding NOTION_TOKEN as env var for native API access (bypasses Pipedream limitations)
Test SMS rule with 'n5 deal add Test Co careerspan testing' to verify end-to-end
